name: mcp-spec
displayName: Model Context Protocol (MCP) — spec + clients + servers
description: The MCP open protocol spec — clients, servers, transport (stdio / http / sse), capabilities, tools, resources, prompts, sampling. Tracks modelcontextprotocol.io docs plus the spec / TypeScript SDK / Python SDK repos.
notes: The MCP spec lives in 3 places: modelcontextprotocol.io (the docs site, ~116 pages), the modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol GitHub repo (the canonical spec), and the language-specific SDK repos. This skill primarily tracks the docs site; the SDK repos are tracked for version bumps + bug-issue surfacing.

dispatch table is best-effort — modelcontextprotocol.io's URL structure is less rigidly categorised than the Anthropic surfaces, so the research agent has more discretion on where to put a given page.
